results.title: India was forced to play Vaibhav Sooryavanshi in England due to indirect pressure, Gambhir had no say
results.description: Gambhir & Agarkar had decided that Sanju Samson would play 6 matches, and Vaibhav Sooryavanshi would only get one match. The post India was forced to play Vaibhav Sooryavanshi in England due to indirect pressure, Gambhir had no say appeared first on Inside Sport India .

results.title: Assam: Massive boulder crashes into Guwahati house after landslide, family escapes unhurt
results.description: A residential building in Guwahati's Odalbakra locality was damaged after a massive boulder rolled down a hillside and crashed into the structure on Wednesday, July 15 evening, triggering panic among residents. No injuries were reported as members of the affected family managed to escape unharmed.

results.title: At Mirzapur centre, student flags monkey menace and faulty clocks
results.description: The NTA had supplied the clocks to nearly 93,000 examination halls where the test was being held to enable students to keep track of time, since mobile phones and watches are not permitted inside the exam centres.
